programme.desc: Its a family affair as Freds parents come for lunch and electrician Jordan brings his mum for a double date. And Ukrainian single mum Kateryna meets warm-hearted Peter.

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: Chris Packham joins Xander for an exciting excursion in Kent, exploring battlefields and castles, as they chat about lifes challenges.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition is in Exeter this time and first to host is 35-year-old salon owner Hannah, whos hoping to impress her guests with a menu bursting with taste sensations.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day two of the competition in Exeter and funeral director and BMX fanatic Simon is hoping an evening of big portions and `man food will bag him the top spot.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the third day of the competition in Exeter and the turn of Pascale to host. Pascale prepares a Vietnamese menu for her guests, full of flavour and colour.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the fourth day of the competition in Exeter and the turn of Nick to host. Nick prepares a menu that represents his personality: big, bold and brash.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Exeter, Estate agent Ajay is hoping her nautical themed evening will see her sail to victory. Along with a gigantic seafood spread, Ajays also laid on a boat trip around Torquay harbour.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 49-year-old performing arts teacher Helen is getting the party started. Flamboyant Helens cooking doesnt exactly go to plan but her dinner party is all about the entertainment and she certainly delivers on that.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the second day of the competition in Sheffield and the turn of design and technology teacher Claire to impress the guests with her Asian inspired menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day three in Sheffield and the turn of service administrator Monika to host. Shes hoping to win the prize by treating her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night, inspired by her homeland.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day four in Sheffield and 80s musician Ivors turn to host. After tensions rose between Claire and Helen at Bulgarian Monikas night, Ivors determined to put some fun into his evening with a live performance from his own band.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day in Sheffield and the turn of former chef Simon. Hes confident that his meal will be head and shoulders above the competition, but after all the criticism hes dished out this week, hes not going to get an easy ride.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Blackburn, three couples compete to host the best dinner party, in a week featuring housework confessions, over-cooked prawns and a hair-raising discovery.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We catch up with Emily and Dustin, who had six weeks to get out of Emilys parental home. And did Sarah and Ian solve their size vs location dilemma and settle in beloved Balham?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liz has long-dreamt of owning a holiday home in her favourite part of Catalonia - Sitges. Will any of Jasmine Harmans options for her £180k impress her enough to make an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps recently engaged Michelle and Steve find the perfect family holiday home in and around the beautiful villages of Haute Vienne in southern France, for their £100k budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Alexis and her husband are approaching retirement and have decided that now is the time to make Spains Costa Blanca their permanent home. Can Craig Rowe find the perfect place for £250k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Allie and Cliff have decided to leave the UK and find their new forever home on the beautiful Greek island of Crete. Ben Hillman has been challenged to find the best properties around for their £240,000 budget.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Romance builds in Surrey; can Emily and Jack, whove put their wedding on hold, avoid being housefished again? And Janes loved and lost property gets a second chance.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Kate Garraway, Phil Wang, Gbemisola Ikumelo and Sophie Willan take on mini loaf cakes and reveal their hidden talents in showstopping choux.

programme.title: Free Guy
programme.desc: A bank teller called Guy realises he is a background character in an open world video game called Free City that will soon go offline.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best loved famous faces share their sharp, insightful, funny and emotional views on popular and topical TV shows. From Saturday night entertainment juggernauts to the weeks biggest news stories, celebs become opinionated viewers.

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Joe Wilkinson and Alex Brooker take on Kevin Bridges and Judi Love. Brian Butterfield (Peter Serafinowicz) joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: David ODoherty joins Joe Lycett for a Costa del stroll along the Caminito del Rey, a drink from a 100-year-old barrel, a spot of dolphin watching and a visit to Pablo Picassos birthplace.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: The Beast from the East descends, covering parts of the UK in a blanket of snow and ice and bringing some of the countrys busiest roads to a standstill. Phones are ringing off the hook at as scores of drivers are left stranded on Britains roads.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves
programme.desc: A couple enlist Big Andys help for their very literal house move from Pembrokeshire to its new location near Wolverhampton, and a glamping hut lift tests nerves in Northumberland.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves
programme.desc: The crew collect an unusual load at Teeside airport - a decommissioned passenger jet destined for Durham, but the journey and the unload could prove problematic. (S1 Ep2)

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves
programme.desc: A fragile steel and glass bridge in Gloucester, a 100-tonne industrial valve in Wales, and a towering tram in Blackpool - three challenging moves that put haulage crews to the test. (S1 Ep3)

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: We are back on the roads with Cheshire Polices elite team of motorway cops. Storms bring travel chaos to the roads and PC Mike responds to a call for urgent backup on the night shift.

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: With three million dashcams now in vehicles, a look at some of Britains worst driving offenders.

programme.title: The Far Country
programme.desc: Classic tale in which a cowboys dreams of peace and prosperity in the Canadian gold towns are unexpectedly shattered by a corrupt sheriff. The unscrupulous lawman steals the cowboys valuable herd of cattle and kills his close friend, leaving him with no option but to fight back.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Interceptors are outnumbered and outmuscled when they stop a coach load of cage fighters following an anonymous tip that there are drugs on board, and Kev and Andy pull over a Peugeot but the occupants are in no mood to hang around.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder must find a way to capture an alien bounty hunter who has been murdering doctors and has kidnapped Scully.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: When animals from a zoo in Fairfield, Idaho, disappear from their cages, reappearing miles away, and a local man is killed by an invisible force, Mulder and Scully investigate. They become caught in a conflict between an animal rights activist and a zoo director, and Scully is forced to conduct the strangest autopsy of her career.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully investigate the rusting hulk of a new naval destroyer whose crew died of premature ageing. They are reminded of the Philadelphia Experiment, which took place during the Second World War where the US government attempted to make battleships invisible to radar, but stranded on the ghost ship, they also fall prey to a wrinkle in time.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully travel to Gibsonton, Florida, a town built and populated by circus and sideshow performers, to investigate the death of Jerald Glazebrook, the Alligator Man. While searching for leads on the killer, the agents come across many bizarre characters including the local sheriff who was once known as Jim, the Dog-Faced Boy.

programme.title: Walking Wartime Britain
programme.desc: Pilot and former Royal Marine, Arthur Williams, walks across Britain to discover the people and places that changed the course the Second World War, he begins his journey in Liverpool.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Deep in cattle country, Anthony and Danielle have an urgent water-drilling job to replace a collapsed well. Plus, a cross-country convoy of drag racing cars is off to Perth.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie prepares for the biggest house move in the familys career. Jason must transport a massive cargo into the outback with only a narrow window of clear weather.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark prepares a massive load travelling from South Australia all the way to a tiny island in Micronesia. And Mick transports a curious giraffe through Sydney traffic.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Extreme weather and crumbling infrastructure create tough conditions for Mark in Micronesia. And Sludge travels deep into the outback for cattle stations in need of diesel fuel.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: Star-studded saga of the 1836 defence of the Alamo, when a 187-strong garrison including William Travis and Jim Bowie fought to save Texas from Santa Annas Mexican army for 13 days. The rivalry of the two leaders was tempered by the arrival of Davy Crockett, who brought his Tennessee volunteers to fight alongside them.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle; a womans impatience lands her in hot water when shes pulled over for tailgating; officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: PC Damo Stevens takes on an aggressive arsonist intent on bringing Darlington to a standstill, dog handler Andy Hunt is called to a violent domestic disturbance, and Sergeant Kev Salter is hot on the heels of a runaway quad bike.

programme.title: Scam City
programme.desc: The French capital may be the city of art, style and romance, but theres a seamy underside that tourists seldom see. Conor Woodman investigates.

programme.title: Scam City
programme.desc: The French capital may be the city of art, style and romance, but theres a seamy underside that tourists seldom see. Conor Woodman investigates.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The doctors treat a wave of patients in search of physical and emotional pain relief, including a man with a painful toe who has performed his own self-diagnosis, and a woman who is in a low mood after donating her kidney to her sister.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Chicken Pox
programme.desc: Phoebes submariner boyfriend visits New York on leave from the Navy. Unfortunately, Phoebe catches chicken pox at baby Bens first birthday party. Meanwhile, when Monica realises that Richard has no real neuroses, she worries that she is too strange for him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Barry and Mindys Wedding
programme.desc: When Rachel serves as a bridesmaid at the wedding of her ex-fiance Barry and her friend Mindy, she relives the nightmare of her own failed wedding day. Meanwhile, Chandler becomes enamoured with a woman he meets on the internet, but is surprised when he finally meets her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is dating Rachel again but hates what he had to do to get back together, while Phoebe and her real mother, Phoebe Snr, get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Monica is badly stung by a jellyfish and has to resort to drastic measures to relieve the pain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey lose all their furniture, Monica finds that one date with her high-school heartthrob is more than enough, and Ross plays tricks on Rachel following their break-up. Elsewhere, Phoebe is temporarily convinced that a cat is the reincarnation of her dead adoptive mother Lily.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a brief fling with Rachels boss Joanna which leaves him handcuffed without his trousers in her office. Meanwhile, Joey can only afford one book in an encyclopaedia set, and Monica caters a party for her mother.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey argues with the building superintendent Treegar and ends up having to help him practise ballroom dancing. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler cant get out of their gym membership even though neither of them wants to exercise, and Phoebe loses her massage job for kissing a client.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car Back!
programme.desc: Following the dramatic work of recovery crews as they trace, track and tow vehicles driven illegally on Britains roads. With access to two recovery companies, featuring the action from the moment they are called in, to the trucks arriving on scene.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: Rogue Claimers returns, exposing the extraordinary lengths insurance fraudsters go to. An amateur detective turns the tables on scammers behind a calculated crash-for-cash scheme. (S2 Ep1)

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: Insurers catch a serial fraudster making fake claims off the back of high-profile tragedies, and theres trouble in store for a supermarket when a group of women stages a fall. (S2 Ep2)

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: CCTV reveals the truth when car passengers claim serious injuries after a bus collision, and a prisoners gym injury claim collapses when evidence shows he had never set foot inside. (S2 Ep3)

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: Secret filming exposes a greedy opportunist exaggerating a personal injury claim, and sparks fly when a claim for a solitaire diamond isnt as clear-cut as insurers are led to believe.

programme.desc: Why do dogs bury bones? Can elephants detect bombs? Why do birds sing in the morning? Plus, what makes seahorses almost indestructible?

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Forrest Galante scours the globe using cutting-edge technology on his mission to find species the world has stopped looking for from the Florida Everglades to remote jungles in a search for the truth.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: With the seasons end looming, SJ and John engage in a power struggle over mining locations when the women return to Gold Run.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: A communications company is in need of an interactive aquarium shaped like a giant telephone. Can Wayne and Brett rustle up a tank that will get them talking?

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: In Vegas, the guys create a smoker tank for The Rolling Smoke BBQ. Plus, The Salt Life Food Shack asks the duo to bring the sea to life with a pipeline wave tank.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: Extreme weather threatens the locals who must brave the frozen wilderness to hunt big game. Plus, a landowner begins to open the frontier to the outside world.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The hidden city inside the mountain is within reach, but exploration means convincing locals for help. Its 40 below and the trailblazing ranchers are in danger.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A family buy a building that was rumoured to be haunted and discover a gangster was murdered there. Also, a family experience events that make them take a close look at their home.

programme.title: The Million Dollar Duck
programme.desc: Dive into the weird world of the Federal Duck Stamp Contest, where the artists competitively paint waterfowl in their obsessive quests to win the Olympics of wildlife art.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Charlotte Smith and Adam Henson visit Oswestry Livestock Market, one of the regions largest weekly cattle and sheep markets. With livestock numbers falling and markets closing nationwide, Oswestry remains a crucial lifeline, not just for trade, but for farming communities to come together.

programme.title: BAFTA Television Awards
programme.desc: The prestigious BAFTA Television Awards return with host Greg Davies at the helm. It has been a landmark year for storytelling, with Adolescence, A Thousand Blows and Amandaland all vying for top honours. From groundbreaking drama to the best in entertainment and factual programming, the creativity that defined the last twelve months will be celebrated. Viewers will be treated to a night of glamour, heartfelt speeches and spectacular live music as the best TV of 2026 is crowned.

Viewers will be treated to a night of glamour, heartfelt speeches and spectacular live music as the best TV of 2026 is crowned.

programme.desc: John Simpson brings his expertise to bear on the most important stories. In discussion with the BBCs range of experts across the world, he uses their unique local knowledge to go beyond the headlines to get to the unspun truth about the world.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.sub-title: How Do The Oceans Shape Our World?
programme.desc: The oceans cover about 70% of the planet and are crucial for life on Earth. Oceanographer Helen Czerski reveals how the seas around us regulate the climate and the weather, even in the desert.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Clive Myries Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Clive heads for the east coast of Barbados to check out the worlds oldest rum distillery. He explores the sugar cane fields and the factory floor before he gets the chance to have a sip of the golden produce.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The BBCs Breakfast programme features the latest news, sport, business, weather and other items on a daily basis.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gabby Logan presents highlights from the days five Premier League games, including Manchester City against Brentford and Liverpool versus Chelsea. Elsewhere, Sunderland host Manchester United at the Stadium of Light, Fulham face Bournemouth at Craven Cottage, and Brighton take on Wolves.

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: The big names behind the big stories. Laura Kuenssberg talks to those making the news, inside and outside politics.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A stunning multi-million-pound project in London that Tommy first saw in 2021 reaches an epic conclusion. Martel encounters two characterful projects in North Yorkshire and Cumbria.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams of amateur collectors have an hour at antiques fairs from Glasgow to Gloucester and other points around the UK. In that hour they must acquire the best bargains possible on a budget of 300 pounds.

programme.title: The Best Dishes Ever
programme.desc: Todays dishes all have a bit of a kick to them and include a fiery red rice salad from Mary Berry, Nigel Slaters `hangover beef salad, Nigella Lawsons coffee ice-cream and the great Keith Floyd cooking a spicy steak Texan-style.

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers have their say on BBC television programmes.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After being fired from the `Anti-Villain League, Gru travels to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother. Once united the siblings find themselves on a mission to take down a former child star from the 1980s, now out for revenge.

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek, the Weatherman, is in fine voice when he kicks off his walk in Cardigan, home of the first Eisteddfod. After visiting the castle, lovingly restored by locals, he learns about the dying `art of Seine net fishing before climbing the famous mount at Mwnt. He also gets to feed an alpaca and take tea with the WI at his final destination, Aberporth where he meets a fellow meteorologist, 98-year-old Joan.

programme.title: Iolos River Valleys
programme.desc: Iolo Williams explores the Usk valley, from Newports urban wildlife to ground-nesting birds, a huge lesser horseshoe bat roost and scarce firecrests.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Charlotte Smith and Adam Henson visit Oswestry Livestock Market, one of the regions largest weekly cattle and sheep markets. As spring trading peaks, they step into a fast-moving world where fortunes can change in minutes. With livestock numbers falling and markets closing nationwide, Oswestry remains a crucial lifeline, not just for trade, but for farming communities to come together.

programme.title: BAFTA Television Awards
programme.desc: The prestigious BAFTA Television Awards return with host Greg Davies at the helm. It has been a landmark year for storytelling, with Adolescence, A Thousand Blows and Amandaland all vying for top honours. From groundbreaking drama to the best in entertainment and factual programming, the creativity that defined the last twelve months will be celebrated. Viewers will be treated to a night of glamour, heartfelt speeches and spectacular live music as the best TV of 2026 is crowned.

When Miranda sees a photo of her intended date hes so bad that the only option left is to lie and to come out to her mother.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Driven into a jealous rage by Lilith and her new boyfriends proximity to him and Madeline, Frasier decides the best method to get even is a noisy night of passion.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A fresh set of BandBers descend on Greenhills Hotel in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, where hosts Maxine and Tegan are hoping to make their guests feel like part of the family. After some picky room inspections, the BandBers cause a commotion on a seal safari.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Tal-Y-Cafn in Conwy. Chef Dan and his partner Lucy hope to cook up a storm for their guests. The hosts make a splash with an afternoon of inland surfing, but Dans cockiness about his breakfast proves misplaced.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Raymond lies and tells Debra that hes already bought her an incredibly thoughtful Christmas present, he frantically tries to figure out what to get her.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank must make amends with his granddaughter, Ally, when she catches him stealing food at the supermarket.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras tired of sharing all her space with Ray, so he decides to give her exclusive use of their bathroom while he shares the kids.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are excited to have finally met a couple, Neil and Lauren, who are just like them. Ray starts having mixed feelings though when their son Spencer wreaks havoc around the Barone household.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert think he has finally found the one in Angela. Shes an international-trade lawyer whos bright, speaks four languages, clearly loves Robert, and seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie visits an optician and winds up with a pair of glasses just in time for the holidays. Unfortunately, she ends up putting the whole family on edge when she starts seeing them for better and for worse.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray loses his ring he is propositioned by an attractive woman at the airport. When Debra learns what happened, she pretends to be single, but her plan has disastrous results.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After hurting themselves during a tryst, Ray and Debra say they fell down the stairs. During home repairs, Frank gets hurt causing Ray and Debra to feel guilty about their lie.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: A definitive one-stop shop for all things cruise, bringing you the hottest destinations and the latest deals to ensure that your next cruise ship holiday is your greatest one yet.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Featuring music from pop sensation Ellie Goulding and an exclusive performance from the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webbers new West End musical, `School of Rock. Plus, one unsuspecting member of the public will get the surprise of their life when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Its Barneys birthday, and after a pit-stop at the iconic Niagara Falls, the Walshes head to Lake Placid to recreate their very own `Miracle on Ice. As a treat that night, Barney swaps the RV bunks for beds at the Trapp Family Lodge. The next day, armed with crampons and ice picks, Brad and Barney take on an frozen rock face before jumping into sleds with some four-legged friends and riding through a winter wonderland in Vermont.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: On the final leg of their US road trip, Brad and Barney take rally cars for a spin on the ice, before settling the score at Moose Alley bowling in Maine. To help them with the extreme weather, Barneys arranged for some wilderness training with expert Joel Graves, before an early start as the boys go lobster fishing off Swans Island. Finally, to round off an epic adventure, the duo settle down to a good old sing-song.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Theyll be travelling from their home in Essex all the way to the Amalfi Coast in Italy, but the first stop on their road trip is the Netherlands, where they try out one of the countrys oldest sports, canal jumping. The action continues when the pair don lycra for a spot of velodrome track cycling alongside a world champion.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh continue their European adventure in Germany. They head to the city of Frankfurt, where Brad is literally pushed to the edge as he attempts to abseil down the side of a building, facing forwards. The boys also make a stop at a bratwurst-themed hotel, and soak up some local Bavarian culture when they have a go at finger wrestling. The pair finish off their time in Germany with a wet and wild adventure in the mountains.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: As Joey agonises over his secret affection for Rachel, Monica mistakenly thinks that he is infatuated with Phoebe. Meanwhile, Ross and Rachel promise not to try to find out the sex of their unborn child, but Rachel cant resist having a peek inside the doctors confidential folder. Also, Monica urges a reluctant Chandler to enjoy the soothing pleasures of a scented bath, but realises that shes created a tub monster.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey rushes pregnant Rachel to hospital when she experiences pains. When Ross feels left out, Joey makes a gallant suggestion. Meanwhile, Chandler is surprised to discover what is behind the locked door of Monicas secret cupboard, and Phoebe gets the impression that Monica is enjoying one of her massages a little too much.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares for a sexy Valentines Day, but Chandler is too shell-shocked after accidentally viewing Rachels birthing video. Meanwhile, Phoebe gives Joey the worlds most cheerful dog.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross, while Chandler becomes nervous when Phoebes handsome new boyfriend Don shares numerous personality traits with Monica.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The father and son have reached Slovenia, a country that loves its sport. Brads passion for bikes gives Barney an excuse to take his dad motocross racing. After hearing that one in 200 people in Slovenia is a beekeeper, they make a stop to meet one.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The next stop on Bradley and Barney Walshs European road trip is Switzerland. They take in the breath-taking views with a ride on a mountain rollercoaster, before exercising their vocal chords when they try the Swiss tradition of yodeling. The following day, Barney arranges a unique way for them to enjoy some local cheese, and then drive to the Contra Dam, where Barney reveals they are about to attempt one of James Bonds most iconic stunts, a petrifying 220 metre-high bungee jump.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: For the penultimate leg of their journey Bradley and Barney head to Italy, starting by the picturesque Lake Garda, where Barney surprises his dad by explaining they will be running off the top of Monte Baldo and paragliding over the lake below. Soon after, Bradley takes a dip in the lake when he tries paddleboard yoga. The next day the guys travel to the River Po for a boat trip like no other, as Bradley is treated to a hair-raising ride in a Formula 1 speed boat.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Barney and Bradley Walsh embark on the final leg of their European road trip, as they continue to explore Italy. Having reached Rome, they take a trip back in time to battle it out as gladiators. They continue south and make a stop to soak up the views from a sky high zipwire. As the boys reach their final stop on the Amalfi Coast, they get the chance to swim in the stunning sea, but theyll have to cliff dive in first.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The boys are back! Bradley and Barney Walsh embark on a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, starting off in the sunny south of Croatia and ending up in the ice-cold Arctic Circle in Scandinavia. Theres no easing his dad in on this trip for Barney. First up, they swing off the roof of Splits iconic football stadium, before diving headfirst into the crystal clear waters of the Adriatic Sea. The action continues when the pair go head to head on aqua bikes alongside a former world champion.

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney leave Croatia behind and say hello to Hungary, where the boys take to the open waters of Lake Balaton for a spot of high-speed catamaran sailing before warming up with some world-famous goulash. The pair finish their time in Budapest, where Barney and Bradley meet a world-famous escapologist.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Featuring music from pop sensation Ellie Goulding and an exclusive performance from the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webbers new West End musical, `School of Rock. Plus, one unsuspecting member of the public will get the surprise of their life when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Maries good intentions backfire badly when they try to drive Robert back into Amys arms, and find that Amy and Gianni are actually hitting it off.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: While the Barones watch their sons play, Ray finds that Geoff is having trouble getting the hang of the game, but then learns the hard way that his sons lack of ability shouldnt interfere with either of them enjoying the game.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Its the first Thanksgiving since Debras parents have been divorced and Debra is thrilled that both her parents have agreed to have dinner with the Barones. However, she soon learns that Warren is bringing a date.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert meets a beautiful woman who is a big fan of Ray Barones sports column, but when the woman mistakes Robert for Raymond, Robert doesnt set her straight.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank becomes a wanted man after he catches the ball at a college football game and refuses to give it back to the kicker.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Marie receives a letter from a relative detailing how wonderful her life is, it drives her insane with jealousy and she enlists Debras help in writing a Barone family update.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: In an effort to restore normality to their friendship, Rachel tells Joey a big lie about her unborn child. Meanwhile, Phoebes tea leaves reveal that she will soon encounter the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe brings her annoyingly upbeat boyfriend to Mr and Mrs Gellers 35th wedding anniversary party. Meanwhile, Ross is astounded when his parents ask him and the pregnant Rachel to pretend to be married, in order to avoid a potential scandal.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a `Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle. He is reluctant to let the magazine do a profile of him, but Rachel tries to persuade him to reconsider so that he can mention her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics when she realises how unprepared she is to care for an infant. She reluctantly agrees to allow her frustrating mother Sandra to move in to help her, upsetting Ross. Meanwhile, Monica tries to atone for forgetting to invite Sandra to the baby shower, and Chandler and Ross exhaust themselves by repeatedly playing a confusing game called Bamboozle to help Joey prepare to audition as a game show host.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Cooking Class
programme.desc: When Monicas cooking at the restaurant receives a harsh write-up in a newspaper, she goes to a criticism class taught by the reviewer, hoping to convince him to reconsider his opinion. Meanwhile, Rachel gets upset when a cute salesgirl flirts with Ross while he and Rachel are shopping for baby supplies, and nervous about a major job interview, Chandler receives some questionable coaching from Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: When Rachels pregnancy goes beyond the expected delivery date, the pain makes her increasingly irritable and willing to try anything that might speed up the babys arrival. Meanwhile, Monica and Phoebe bet on the date of the birth, while Joey can only take one guest to the premiere of his film, and chooses Chandler. Unfortunately, Chandler falls asleep during the screening.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward with an anxious Ross, but to her dismay she is put in a semi-private room and then, the heavily pregnant Janice, is allocated to share the room with her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward with an anxious Ross. Numerous other pregnant women are wheeled off to give birth while Rachels painful labour continues. Elsewhere in the hospital, Phoebe is attracted to a handsome patient, Cliff, and asks Joey to pose as Dr Drake Ramoray to interrogate Cliff about his background.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Due to a misunderstanding, Rachel finds herself engaged to Joey instead of Ross shortly after giving birth to her and Rosss baby girl. Meanwhile, Joey cant help taking a look as Rachel tries unsuccessfully to nurse her baby. Inspired to have a baby of their own, Monica and Chandler retire to a hospital cupboard for a little privacy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joeys futile attempts to gain Rosss forgiveness for mistakenly asking Rachel to marry him only result in emergency hospitalisation. Meanwhile, an exhausted Rachel desperately searches for a solution to end baby Emmas non-stop crying.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: When Coachs liaison with the school nurse gets messy, vice principal Jess must enforce a new no fraternization policy among the teachers.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: As part of Winstons police academy training, the loft must pass a home visit and background check, which shouldnt be a problem until Jess admits she might be hiding illegal substances in her closet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler And Monicas Wedding - Part 1
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler prepare for their wedding. Meanwhile, Joey is starring in a movie with a prestigious actor with a spitting problem.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler And Monicas Wedding - Part 2
programme.desc: Joey encounters problems trying to get off the movie set to officiate the wedding when the star turns up drunk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandlers wedding reception is almost upstaged by the news that someone might be pregnant. Meanwhile, Ross tries to impress a pretty single woman, Chandler has troubles on the dance floor, and Joey hopes to impress Chandlers mums date - an important Broadway producer - with his acting ability.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Red Sweater
programme.desc: The girls speculate as to whos the father of Rachels baby, the guys scramble after Chandler loses the film from his wedding, and Monica wants to open the wedding gifts.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everybody seems to know who the father of Rachels baby is except the man himself. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Joey lie about a gas leak to get into Monica and Chandlers apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they wound up in bed together quickly descends into an argument over who seduced who, until Ross shocks the room by announcing that he has the whole encounter on video. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler return from their honeymoon, excited at the prospect of socialising with another just-married couple they met on the flight home.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross gets upset when Rachel goes out on a date with a handsome actor, Phoebe tries to prevent a chef from being sacked, and Chandler kills a co-workers promotion.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Halloween Party
programme.desc: At Monicas Halloween party, Phoebe meets the friendly fiance of her flighty twin Ursula, but becomes alarmed when she learns that her sister has misrepresented herself to her trusting future in-law.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Young Maya pesters her dad to tell her why hes getting divorced, so he tells her the story of his (love) life. Has he missed out on his soulmate?

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross learns that a pregnant Rachel wants to move out and find a place of her own, so he suggests a vacancy in his building. Then he learns that the elderly occupant is not quite dead yet. Meanwhile, Phoebe is ecstatic when Eric dumps her twin sister Ursula and chooses her instead, and Monica comes unhinged when she suspects that her new maid is stealing her jeans, among other things.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for denying Chandler a bachelor party, Monica hires a stripper to perform for him, without learning that shes a prostitute. Elsewhere, Rachels father learns about her pregnancy and plans to give Ross a piece of his mind.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An old high-school friend of Monicas is invited to the Thanksgiving dinner with the gang, but Monica is unaware that he isnt exactly fond of Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe pretend to be mesmerised by American football in order to avoid helping Monica in the kitchen, and Joey vows to devour the entire turkey single-handedly.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is aghast when Monica buys painfully expensive boots, and Phoebe tries to capitalise on her discovery that Ross son attends school with the son of rock star Sting.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross Step Forward
programme.desc: Ross new girlfriend wants to put their photograph on Christmas cards, Rachel eyes Joey as a possible romantic partner, and the newlyweds cope with Chandlers boss as he goes through a divorce.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: To prepare Joey for his big date the following night, Rachel eagerly agrees to go out with him for a rare night on the town. However, when each is pleasantly surprised with their newfound compatibility, they begin to regard each other in a way that no one could have predicted.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: As Joey agonises over his secret affection for Rachel, Monica mistakenly thinks that he is infatuated with Phoebe. Meanwhile, Ross and Rachel promise not to try to find out the sex of their unborn child, but Rachel cant resist having a peek inside the doctors confidential folder. Also, Monica urges a reluctant Chandler to enjoy the soothing pleasures of a scented bath, but realises that shes created a tub monster.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey rushes pregnant Rachel to hospital when she experiences pains. When Ross feels left out, Joey makes a gallant suggestion. Meanwhile, Chandler is surprised to discover what is behind the locked door of Monicas secret cupboard, and Phoebe gets the impression that Monica is enjoying one of her massages a little too much.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares for a sexy Valentines Day, but Chandler is too shell-shocked after accidentally viewing Rachels birthing video. Meanwhile, Phoebe gives Joey the worlds most cheerful dog.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross, while Chandler becomes nervous when Phoebes handsome new boyfriend Don shares numerous personality traits with Monica.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: In an effort to restore normality to their friendship, Rachel tells Joey a big lie about her unborn child. Meanwhile, Phoebes tea leaves reveal that she will soon encounter the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe brings her annoyingly upbeat boyfriend to Mr and Mrs Gellers 35th wedding anniversary party. Meanwhile, Ross is astounded when his parents ask him and the pregnant Rachel to pretend to be married, in order to avoid a potential scandal.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Three contestants hope to answer their way to a fortune. To help them along, they have the guidance of Russell T Davies, AJ Odudu, Deborah Meaden, Bash the Entertainer, Lucy Beaumont, Harry Redknapp and William Hanson.

programme.title: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul `Wrecking Crewe was a revered football superstar back in his day, but that time has since faded. When a messy drunk driving incident lands him in jail, Paul finds he was specifically requested by Warden Hazen, a duplicitous prison official well aware of Pauls athletic skills. Paul has been assigned the task of assembling a team of convicts, to square off in a big football game against the sadistic guards.

programme.desc: Film at the end of his March 2014 tour in the centre of a capacity crowd in Wembley Arena, Jack Whitehall performs new material about his posh upbringing, visits to the doctor and bedroom disasters, with recorded interludes from his father.

programme.desc: When two loyal employees at a family-owned mobile home business are gunned down at work, detectives are left with no hints towards a motive; a hunt for a missing car reveals a killer driven by old-school Orange County, Calif., intentions.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.sub-title: This Horse Needs To Be Put Out of Its Misery
programme.desc: Mike decides to pay it forward and help out a young member of the team by fixing up his 4-liter V6 2007 Mustang. Ant and Mike soon find out that just because this young man works with cars doesnt mean hes taken all Mikes advice to heart.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant welcome a zippy little 1974 Fiat X1/9 sports car to the workshop. Theres hardly any rust, but big problems lurk behind the drivers seat.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Homesteading has exploded in popularity, with families moving to more remote areas and with bigger ambition than ever before. But for the rookie off-gridder striving for self-sufficiency, extreme plans often lead to extreme problems.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Marty returns to Interior Alaska to help a single mother whose homestead is on the brink of ruin. With a quake-damaged water line and bears circling the property, he must act fast to protect the Adams familys animals and dream.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.desc: In the ultimate heres what you couldve won, the participants meet their alternate matches. And it all proves... interesting.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teachers diary and learns a surprising secret; Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a singing sensation; Homer becomes a new man; Cletus turns against his fans.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars
programme.desc: Homer tries to reunite his favourite band from his youth, but film and TV creator J.J. Abrams gets to them first.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business, Lisa refuses to believe hes up to no good.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Panic on the Streets of Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa gets an imaginary friend who makes her feel much better about her friends; Homer gets a vehicle with awesome torque.

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: Slapstick film about a divorced actor who is willing to go to any lengths to get his children back, even posing as a matronly Scottish housekeeper. His family, taken in by the disguise, decide to employ the eccentric but apparently capable widow, and everyone is happy with the arrangement - until the mothers old boyfriend reappears and tries to become a father figure to the children.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best loved famous faces share their sharp, insightful, funny and emotional views on popular and topical TV shows. From Saturday night entertainment juggernauts to the weeks biggest news stories, celebs become opinionated viewers.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: Oliver Tate, fifteen-years-old, has two goals he wants to achieve: to extinguish the flame between his mother and an ex-lover who has resurfaced in her life and to lose his virginity before he turns sixteen.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: June is a wildly imaginative girl who finds herself in Wonderland -- an amusement park she created in her mind. With the park falling into disarray, she soon teams up with a group of lovable animals to try and save Wonderland before its lost forever.

programme.title: The Call of the Wild
programme.desc: In the Canadian Yukon in the 1890s, the gold rush is happening. At this time, the sled dogs who can cover the tough terrain along the river Klondike are coveted by many and they become a valuable asset. As a result, Buck is stolen and sold.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Astronomer John Putnam sees a meteor come down in the desert. Investigating, he finds an alien concealing its craft but nobody will believe him until the invaders start cloning the local townsfolk into emotionless beings. When the aliens kidnap his girlfriend, he must use all his wits and knowledge to rescue her.

programme.title: Brian and Charles
programme.desc: Brian is a lonely inventor in rural Wales who spends his days building quirky, unconventional contraptions that seldom work. Undeterred by his lack of success, he soon attempts his biggest project yet.

programme.title: The Martian: Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Ridley Scott talks about making his science-fiction survival adventure starring Matt Damon.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: After a fierce storm Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead and is left behind by his crew during a manned mission to Mars, but Watney has survived and finds himself stranded and alone on the hostile planet.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman join forces with their American counterparts to battle a ruthless and common enemy.

programme.title: Chopper
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a vicious killer who became a celebrity and best-selling author in Australia.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, a group of elitists gathers at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted, Crystal, turns the tables on her pursuers.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The Mile End Delis classic chopped liver, Ina makes bratwurst at Prime Meats Restaurant and French flageolet beans.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Oyster pan roast and uni butter crostini at John Dory Oyster Bar, Million Dollar Chicken at the Standard Grill, side car cocktails and a taste-off.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina and Giada De Laurentiis cook up a lobster and potato salad lunch, mascarpone and lemon gnocchi, and a chocolate cassis cake.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Chef Tyler Florence and Ina make a chocolate birthday cake for Tylers son and fried chicken with winter slaw.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina and Michael Symon make smoked pork ribs on the grill, tzatziki and hummus, and a mezze platter.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Chocolate cupcakes with peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, chocolate orange fondue, white chocolate truffles, white chocolate bark, mocha chocolate ice box cake.

programme.title: Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue cooks a range of recipes perfect for entertaining guests before welcoming Alison Hammond into her kitchen as the pair make something sweet together.

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie make Sicilian-inspired meatballs and tomato `Norma sauce. Theres also Jamies quick chicken wrap, a silky carbonara of mackerel, and tips on how to get the best out of fresh herbs.

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his stunning fish tikka curry. Hes got two brilliant ideas for making tasty mid-week suppers out of the leftover meat from Sundays roast too.

programme.title: James Martin Digs Deep
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Martin Blunos visits James and together the boys cook up some of Jamess tasty homegrown tomatoes.

programme.title: James Martin Digs Deep
programme.desc: James lives in hope that his melon plant will produce fruit for recipes like a soup with langoustine. Now a consummate gardener, James is photographed with spade in hand before getting dressed for a party.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: Among the desserts created are the classic baked Alaska, pavlova and some macaroons.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: Italian desserts, including raspberry and nougat semi-freddo, grappa sabayon, fruit and nut biscotti with limoncello and ricotta cheese drizzled with honey.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave and Si are on the trail of Oklahomas famous beef. In Oklahoma City a classic T Bone steak is followed by a visit to the citys Vietnamese community, to knock up Vietnams beefy national dish: Pho.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave and Si ride from Texas into New Mexico. From burger joints to a Cowboy Emporium and a Chocolatier to a cheesemaker, the bikers explore the small independently owned restaurants and food producers, places that have achieved special recognition.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: The bikers cross the state of Arizona in search of the Wild West. They start by making a small detour from route 66, starting in Monument Valley to learn more about this striking place and discover the Navajo Nation. First, they enlist some locals to visit the most iconic landscape in the US which is also a very sacred land for the Navajo.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: For the last leg of their route 66 odyssey, the bikers are going west to California, the golden state. First, they make a small detour to the city of light, Las Vegas. Si and Dave have been invited by one of the youngest executive chefs in the country to learn how to make the best mashed potato in the world.

programme.title: Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen

programme.desc: Adam travels to North Carolina to try a 20-ounce bacon double-cheeseburger. Later, he is given one hour to finish off the spiciest burger in Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food Best Of
programme.desc: Adam visits a joint in Oklahoma to try a juicy 22-ounce prime rib. Later on, he takes on the challenge of eating five burger patties topped with American cheese and tortilla chips.

programme.title: Man v. Food Best Of
programme.desc: Adam is in Detroit to sample a grilled hot dog smothered in chilli and mustard. Later, he is challenged to eat five massive hot dogs with a huge side of fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food Best Of
programme.desc: Adam shares his most overstuffed sandwich moments. He competes in Luckys Challenge: finish three massive sandwiches plus fries and coleslaw in one hour.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: Fantastic recipes for tasty sweet breads, such as chocolate and mandarin bread, and scones with jam and marmalade.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: James goes back to basics demonstrating how to make the most delicious, light sponges. Recipes include Victoria sponge, American baked cheesecake and a chocolate roulade.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: Focusing on posh puds, recipes include poached pears with cinnamon and goats milk sauce, sherry trifle with raspberries and lemon and goats cheese tart.

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet
programme.desc: James Martin is one of Britains premier pastry and pudding makers, here he presents some recipes for lemon meringue pie, millefeuille, toffee bananas, banana and custard souffle and ice cream parcels with sponge pudding.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: `The Great British Bake Off makes its debut on Channel 4 as the series returns for an eighth season with 12 budding bakers competing to be crowned the champion. Established judge Paul Hollywood is joined by food connoisseur Prue Leith, while seasoned entertainers Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding take on the role of being the shows hosts. Despite the change in personnel, the key Bake Off traditions remain intact, as the contestants try to impress the panel with a fine selection of beautifully-crafted and delicious cakes, tarts, breads and more.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: `The Great British Bake Off makes its debut on Channel 4 as the series returns for an eighth season with 12 budding bakers competing to be crowned the champion. Established judge Paul Hollywood is joined by food connoisseur Prue Leith, while seasoned entertainers Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding take on the role of being the shows hosts. Despite the change in personnel, the key Bake Off traditions remain intact, as the contestants try to impress the panel with a fine selection of beautifully-crafted and delicious cakes, tarts, breads and more.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Bake Off is back. The tent awaits 12 of the nations best amateur bakers whore out to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, joined by Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its week two and our remaining 11 bakers face Cake Week, kicking off with a crowd-pleasing signature challenge.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its Bread Week, with the 10 bakers having much to prove with a fruity teatime Signature, a rather international-flavoured Technical, and an ambitious Showstopper.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its Dessert Week and the bakers must create a cracking meringue Signature, a wobbly Technical, and a complex chocolate Showstopper that promises to reveal all.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam Richman combines his two great passions, food and football. He visits Britains most famous teams and seeks out footies finest foods.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam Richman is in Birmingham for an Aston Villa home game. He gets to tuck into an Indian mixed grill at a Desi Pub, tries a Champions League standard mushroom ravioli and enjoys a pad Thai at a Villa fans matchday favourite; The Barton Arms.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Atlanta is the next stop on Adams culinary tour, where he attempts to finish a 13-pound Carnivore Pizza. However, this is one challenge hell need some help with.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: The next stop on Adam Richmans culinary tour of the United States is Boston, where he encounters the giant Eagles Challenge Burger. Does it come with a giant soda?

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: The time has come to cross the border from Scotland to England and where better to begin this leg of the journey than James home country of Yorkshire. Here hes joined by Michelin starred chef Lisa Allen. His first stop is Whitby where hes popping into his favourite fish and chip shop before cooking tikka mackerel buns with fennel and apple salad for the crowds at Whitby bandstand. Lisa is paying a visit to The Black Swan.

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James continues his British adventure in Lancashire with top local chef Lisa Allen in the passenger seat of his trusty red mini. Their first stop is an incredible food hall in Lisas home town of Clitheroe. Here they shop and then cook together a fantastic BBQd john dory with kohlrabi and fennel salad. Next, Lisa is in the driving seat as she takes the mini to a local buffalo farm where theyre producing some interesting cheese from buffalo milk.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri road trips across America to check out classic greasy spoons. With a new generation of owners and delicious homemade food, these are the kind of places that make America special.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris coasting through some killer cuisines! A Trinidadian shop in Marietta, GA, is plating lights-out oxtail, a Los Angeles Thai spot is serving beefed-up boat noodles, and an Italian joint near Cincinnati is firing up primo pancetta bucatini.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: World War II in Colour

programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.desc: Chronicling Operation Carpetbagger, one of the most top-secret missions of World War II.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitler becomes a police informer at the NSDAP and soon becomes a leader. He tries to lead a coup in 1923 but fails and ends up in jail for a year where he writes Mein Kampf.

programme.title: Hitler: The Rise To Power

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Series which reveals the events behind a collection of crimes that shook the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Nightmare in Suburbia
programme.desc: Durham couple George and Christina Button lived a happy life, but Christina was secretly mounting up debts. Was murder the only way to pay them off?

programme.title: Listen to This
programme.desc: Charley Bourne and Jack Taylor deduce a spine-chilling cold-case where a bite mark came back to capture the killer after 26 years.

programme.title: Listen to This
programme.desc: An apparent kidnapping by a Satanic cult keeps Charley and Jack guessing, with the case where everything is not exactly as it first seems.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Investigation into Jeremy Bambers brutal murder of his family in Essex in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a model nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, discover why she murdered four children and attempt to kill 11 others.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Eight year old Sarah Paynes disappearance and murder shocked the nation. Here, Sarahs mum reveals her tireless campaign to protect other children from paedophilia.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 22-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during an altercation on the M25 in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: An account of the car bomb carried out by the IRA which killed 29 people in Omagh on 15 August 1998.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: After pub landlord Stephen French murdered a customer at the Wisbech Arms, Cambridgeshire, he invented an elaborate cover story to avoid justice.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: A man jailed for killing his lovers husband.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: The disturbing story of Jennifer Pan, who was found guilty of staging a home invasion with the intention of killing her parents.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: The story of Alan Jermey, a martial arts expert from Surrey who murdered his partner after she told him she had fallen in love with her boss.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: 22-year-old Helen McCourt was returning from work in Liverpool on her way to meet her friend but changed her plans because of bad weather. Fifteen miles away a dog-walker found two bloodstained towels and several items of discarded mens clothing.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Chronicling the desperate search for Carole Packman, who disappeared in 1985 after leaving a note to say she was leaving the family home for good. With the help of the police, they discover her disappearance wasnt as honest as it was first believed.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: 22-year-old Lorraine Benson arrived at Raynes Park tube station, where her friend failed to meet her as planned. Within hours her belongings had been found, and by the morning a body had been discovered beaten and strangled.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Danielle Jones, aged 15, was last seen on June 18, 2001, near her home in East Tilbury, Essex. Her uncle became a suspect, where a search of his house led police to a pair of white stockings stained with blood. Her mother speaks about her murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A look at Raoul Moats shooting spree in Northumberland during the summer of 2010, the huge manhunt that led to his arrest and the aftermath of his vicious attacks.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Victims and police discuss the shocking crimes of entertainer Rolf Harris, who was jailed for a number of sexual offences in 2014.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The wife of Garry Newlove, who was beaten to death outside his home in Cheshire in 2007, looks back at the night of her husbands murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In broad daylight on a busy Woolwich street on 22nd May 2013, serving soldier Fusilier Lee Rigby was attacked and murdered by Islamic extremists Michael Adebolajo and Michael Adebowale.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Several bodies were discovered buried in the back garden of the home of Rose and Fred West in 1994, and it was learned that most of their victims died following episodes of sadistic rape and torture.

programme.desc: With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britains darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Dermots Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot OLeary begins his Irish food tour at Blackhead Lighthouse, taking in sweeping views across Belfast Lough before setting off along the iconic Causeway Coastal Route. programme.title: James Martins French Adventure

Back on shore and hungry from the sea air, he joins bakers Ciara and Dara at Ursa Minor, where they bake a blueberry pie using local fruit and a clever twist.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.desc: Oli Bell presents coverage of racing from Lingfield, Ascot and Haydock. Theres also competitive flat racing at Ascot headlined by the Victoria Cup, plus National Hunt action from Haydock. Analysis comes from Jason Weaver and Leonna Mayor, with reporting from Rishi Persad and Mick Fitzgerald, and commentary from Mark Johnson.

programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.desc: When a barbarous blood-letting in an Oxford museum claims the life of an elderly man, the investigation propels Endeavour and Thursday to a girls school, haunted by memories of an atrocity committed 100 years before.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.sub-title: By the Pricking of My Thumbs
programme.desc: When Tommy and Tuppence visit an elderly aunt in her nursing home, Tuppence is concerned by some odd behaviour of the staff and residents. Later, when Tuppence hears about Aunt Adas sudden death and the disappearance of her aunts friend Mrs Lancaster, she realises her concerns were right. Tuppence meets Miss Marple and together they follow a path of clues that leads them to the village of Farrell St Edmund.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young female member of a new age cult called The Oblong Foundation goes missing, DCI John Barnaby investigates and sends DS Jones undercover at the cults base, Malham Hall. The police learn that the halls previous owners, the Lamberts, died in a gas explosion on board their boat. Barnaby and Jones must try to find out what really happened to the Lamberts - and whether the case has a link to the missing woman.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a farmer is found horribly murdered in the middle of a stone circle, suspicion points at a group of druids. DCI John Barnaby and DS Jones hurry to the scene of the crime, where they are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding on her first assignment. Druid high priest Leticia Clifford shows Barnaby that sacred ley lines run through the stone circle and later is convinced she has made an exciting discovery.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones enter the cloistered and old-fashioned world of Midsomer Priory after a nun is found strangled. Jones visits the local pub, where he learns that a woman was seen acting strangely on the day of the murder, and that teenagers in the area sneak into the priory grounds for romantic liaisons. Later, the nuns discover that a valuable silver altar set has vanished, then the chaplain is found murdered.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A row between keen birdwatchers in Midsomer-in-the-Marsh turns nasty when their president is killed. Patrick Morgan met his death while hoping to sight a rare bird, but is his obsession with ornithology to blame - or something more sinister? Barnaby and Jones attempt to discover the truth.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. A high-stakes criminal trial of a ruthless Brighton drug lord and a puzzling double murder investigation push Graces team to the very brink.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The first ever episode, from 1987, of the drama series featuring Colin Dexters chief inspector, in which Morse teams up with his future partner Sgt Lewis to investigate the case of an attractive woman found dead at her home. All the evidence points to suicide, but Morse is convinced he is dealing with a murder.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora and diver Luc Boerrigter as they return to The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Having failed to land one of the lakes giants in front of the underwater cameras on their previous trip here together, this time they target a huge carp of over 60lbs. Being spring, the carp are constantly on the move around the lake, with the team in hot pursuit. Will the carp run rings around the team, or will the mobile tactics pay off to bank that big one?

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport Archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt.

programme.title: PREM Rugby LIVE
programme.desc: After their dramatic 41-38 win over Bath, Northampton welcome old rivals Leicester Tigers to Franklins Gardens. England stars Fin Smith and Henry Pollock both played their part in that victory and once again will be key men for the Saints as Phil Dowsons side look to maintain their place at the top of the Gallagher Prem table. The Tigers will be out to make amends for their defeat to Saracens last time out as they look to secure a play off spot.
